data.title: Rules Engine — Production Overview
data.description: Full observability for rules-engine and sre-agent: RED metrics, pipeline throughput, ClickHouse/Postgres dependency health, and SRE findings. Queries run against signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3.

widgets.title: Total Spans
widgets.description: Total spans ingested across rules-engine and sre-agent in the selected time window.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toFloat64(count()) as value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName IN ('rules-engine', 'sre-agent') AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}}

widgets.title: Error Rate (%)
widgets.description: Percentage of spans with statusCode = 2 (OTEL Error) across both services.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT round(countIf(statusCode = 2) / count() * 100, 2) as value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName IN ('rules-engine', 'sre-agent') AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}}

widgets.title: P99 Latency (ms)
widgets.description: 99th-percentile span duration across all operations for both services.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT round(quantile(0.99)(durationNano) / 1e6, 2) as value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName IN ('rules-engine', 'sre-agent') AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}}

widgets.title: Avg Latency (ms)
widgets.description: Mean span duration across all operations for both services.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT round(avg(durationNano) / 1e6, 2) as value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName IN ('rules-engine', 'sre-agent') AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}}

widgets.title: Span Rate by Service (per minute)
widgets.description: Number of spans emitted per minute, broken down by service. Proxy for request throughput.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as ts, count() as spans FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'rules-engine' AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

clickhouse_sql.name: B
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as ts, count() as spans FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'sre-agent' AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

widgets.title: Latency Percentiles — All Services (ms)
widgets.description: P50, P95, P99 span duration over time. Spike in P99 with flat P50 = outlier operations; both spiking = systemic slowdown.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as ts, round(quantile(0.50)(durationNano) / 1e6, 2) as p50_ms FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName IN ('rules-engine', 'sre-agent') AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

clickhouse_sql.name: B
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as ts, round(quantile(0.95)(durationNano) / 1e6, 2) as p95_ms FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName IN ('rules-engine', 'sre-agent') AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

clickhouse_sql.name: C
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as ts, round(quantile(0.99)(durationNano) / 1e6, 2) as p99_ms FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName IN ('rules-engine', 'sre-agent') AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

widgets.title: Error Rate over Time (%) by Service
widgets.description: Percentage of spans marked as OTEL Error status per minute, per service. Zero is the goal.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as ts, round(countIf(statusCode = 2) / count() * 100, 2) as error_pct FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'rules-engine' AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

clickhouse_sql.name: B
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as ts, round(countIf(statusCode = 2) / count() * 100, 2) as error_pct FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'sre-agent' AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

widgets.title: ClickHouse Operation Latency (ms)
widgets.description: Avg latency for clickhouse.query and clickhouse.insert spans. High insert latency in sre-agent means observation writes are lagging.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as ts, round(avg(durationNano) / 1e6, 2) as avg_ms FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'rules-engine' AND name = 'clickhouse.query' AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

clickhouse_sql.name: B
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as ts, round(avg(durationNano) / 1e6, 2) as avg_ms FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'sre-agent' AND name = 'clickhouse.query' AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

clickhouse_sql.name: C
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as ts, round(avg(durationNano) / 1e6, 2) as avg_ms FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'sre-agent' AND name = 'clickhouse.insert' AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

widgets.title: HTTP Response Latency by Service (ms)
widgets.description: Avg and P95 latency for 'response' spans — the HTTP layer for both services. Covers health, readiness, rules CRUD, metrics, analytics, and simulation endpoints.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as ts, round(avg(durationNano) / 1e6, 2) as avg_ms FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'rules-engine' AND name = 'response' AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

clickhouse_sql.name: B
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as ts, round(quantile(0.95)(durationNano) / 1e6, 2) as p95_ms FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'rules-engine' AND name = 'response' AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

clickhouse_sql.name: C
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as ts, round(avg(durationNano) / 1e6, 2) as avg_ms FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'sre-agent' AND name = 'response' AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

clickhouse_sql.name: D
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as ts, round(quantile(0.95)(durationNano) / 1e6, 2) as p95_ms FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'sre-agent' AND name = 'response' AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

widgets.title: SRE Agent — Scan Activity
widgets.description: ClickHouse writes per minute from sre-agent (each write = one scan cycle persisting findings). Gap = scan stalled. High insert latency = ClickHouse pressure.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as ts, count() as inserts FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'sre-agent' AND name = 'clickhouse.insert' AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

clickhouse_sql.name: B
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as ts, count() as queries FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'sre-agent' AND name = 'clickhouse.query' AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

widgets.title: Top Operations by P95 Latency
widgets.description: All span names ranked by P95 duration. Use this to identify slow operations. 'errors' = spans with OTEL statusCode=2.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT serviceName as service, name as operation, count() as calls, round(avg(durationNano) / 1e6, 2) as avg_ms, round(quantile(0.50)(durationNano) / 1e6, 2) as p50_ms, round(quantile(0.95)(durationNano) / 1e6, 2) as p95_ms, round(quantile(0.99)(durationNano) / 1e6, 2) as p99_ms, round(max(durationNano) / 1e6, 2) as max_ms, countIf(statusCode = 2) as errors FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName IN ('rules-engine', 'sre-agent') AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY service, operation ORDER BY p95_ms DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Span Volume by Kind
widgets.description: Server spans = HTTP requests handled. Client spans = outbound calls. Consumer spans = Kafka messages consumed. Internal = utility operations.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as ts, count() as spans FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName IN ('rules-engine', 'sre-agent') AND spanKind = 'Internal' AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

clickhouse_sql.name: B
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as ts, count() as spans FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName IN ('rules-engine', 'sre-agent') AND spanKind = 'Server' AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

clickhouse_sql.name: C
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as ts, count() as spans FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName IN ('rules-engine', 'sre-agent') AND spanKind = 'Client' AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

clickhouse_sql.name: D
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as ts, count() as spans FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName IN ('rules-engine', 'sre-agent') AND spanKind = 'Consumer' AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

widgets.title: Pipeline Batch Throughput
widgets.description: Spans from pipeline.batch and event.parse operations (rules-engine Kafka consumer). Absence = no Kafka traffic or spans not yet flowing. Each pipeline.batch span covers one Redpanda fetch cycle.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as ts, round(avg(durationNano) / 1e6, 2) as avg_ms FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'rules-engine' AND name = 'pipeline.batch' AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

clickhouse_sql.name: B
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as ts, round(avg(durationNano) / 1e6, 2) as avg_ms FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'rules-engine' AND name = 'event.parse' AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

clickhouse_sql.name: C
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) as ts, round(avg(durationNano) / 1e6, 2) as avg_ms FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'rules-engine' AND name = 'flush' AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) >= {{.start_timestamp}} AND toUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) <= {{.end_timestamp}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts
